title: anartia wulfschlaegelii
intro: Anartia wulfschlaegelii, also known as the Wulfschlaegel's blue glasswing butterfly plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Anartia wulfschlaegelii include its ability to treat fever, sore throats, and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing its leaves in hot water or using its extracts in topical creams and ointments.
